privacy.title: Prywatność
privacy.friends_only_desc: Only people you've linked with can see your profile.
privacy.everyone_desc: Dowolnyone on Mingla can find you i see your profile.
privacy.nobody_desc: You're invisible. Nie one can see your profile — full ghost mode.
privacy.show_activity_on: Znajomi can see what you've been up to lately.
privacy.show_activity_off: Your activity is hidden from everyone.

delete.title: The Red Zone
delete.warning: This permanently deletes your data, your boards, i your history. There's no undo.
delete.confirm_body: Deleting your account removes everything — your profile, boards, links, i activity. This can't be reversed.
delete.deleting_title: We're sad to see you go
delete.deleting_body: Packing up your things i sweeping the floors.
delete.deleting_sub: This takes a moment. Hang tight.
delete.success_body: You're always welcome back. We'll leave the light on.
delete.success_sub: Signing you out now. Until next time.
delete.error_default: Coś poszło nie tak. Please try again.
delete.error_must_sign_in: You must be signed in to delete your account.
delete.error_timeout: This is taking longer than expected. Your account may already be deleted — try closing i reopening the app.
